// ============================================================ // GOLF PERFORMANCE DASHBOARD — v9 // DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE to add rounds. // Add rounds to rounds_data.js only. // Season averages are calculated automatically from ROUNDS. // ============================================================ // ── HCP Benchmarks ────────────────────────────────────────── const HCP_BENCHMARKS = [ { hcp:“5”, fir:62, playable:85, gir:58, putts:30.5, threePutt:5, dblWorse:5, par3:3.15, par4:4.20, par5:4.85, upDown:52, gir200p:28, gir175_200:42, gir150_175:55, gir100_125:68, girU100:82 }, { hcp:“9”, fir:48, playable:73, gir:36, putts:32.5, threePutt:11, dblWorse:14, par3:3.50, par4:4.60, par5:5.40, upDown:33, gir200p:12, gir175_200:22, gir150_175:32, gir100_125:48, girU100:68 }, { hcp:“10”, fir:52, playable:72, gir:40, putts:32.0, threePutt:9, dblWorse:14, par3:3.35, par4:4.60, par5:5.45, upDown:36, gir200p:15, gir175_200:25, gir150_175:36, gir100_125:52, girU100:70 }, { hcp:“12”, fir:47, playable:68, gir:36, putts:32.5, threePutt:11, dblWorse:18, par3:3.50, par4:4.70, par5:5.55, upDown:30, gir200p:10, gir175_200:20, gir150_175:30, gir100_125:45, girU100:65 }, { hcp:“15”, fir:41, playable:62, gir:30, putts:33.5, threePutt:14, dblWorse:22, par3:3.65, par4:4.85, par5:5.70, upDown:26, gir200p:8, gir175_200:16, gir150_175:25, gir100_125:38, girU100:58 }, { hcp:“18”, fir:34, playable:55, gir:24, putts:34.8, threePutt:18, dblWorse:28, par3:3.90, par4:5.10, par5:6.00, upDown:22, gir200p:5, gir175_200:12, gir150_175:20, gir100_125:30, girU100:50 }, { hcp:“20”, fir:28, playable:50, gir:18, putts:35.5, threePutt:22, dblWorse:33, par3:4.10, par4:5.30, par5:6.20, upDown:18, gir200p:3, gir175_200:9, gir150_175:15, gir100_125:24, girU100:42 }, { hcp:“24”, fir:22, playable:44, gir:12, putts:36.5, threePutt:27, dblWorse:40, par3:4.30, par4:5.55, par5:6.55, upDown:14, gir200p:2, gir175_200:6, gir150_175:10, gir100_125:18, girU100:34 }, ]; const GOAL_HCP = HCP_BENCHMARKS.find(b => b.hcp === “9”); const BUCKETS = [”>200”,“175-200”,“150-175”,“125-150”,“100-125”,“75-100”,“50-75”,”<50”]; // ── Auto-calculate Season Averages from ROUNDS ─────────────── function calcSA(rounds) { if (!rounds.length) return {}; const avg = key => rounds.reduce((s,r) => s + (r[key]||0), 0) / rounds.length; const avgB = key => { const vals = rounds.map(r => r.approach[key]).filter(v => v != null); return vals.length ? vals.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0) / vals.length : null; }; return { score: avg(“score”), adjScore: avg(“adjScore”), fir: avg(“fir”), playable: avg(“playable”), missTeeLeft:avg(“missTeeLeft”), missTeeRight:avg(“missTeeRight”), ob: avg(“ob”), gir: avg(“gir”), greenShort: avg(“greenShort”), greenLong: avg(“greenLong”), greenLeft: avg(“greenLeft”), greenRight: avg(“greenRight”), putts: avg(“putts”), onePutt: avg(“onePutt”), twoPutt: avg(“twoPutt”), threePutt: avg(“threePutt”), upDownPct: avg(“upDownPct”), penalties: avg(“penalties”), par3: avg(“par3”), par4: avg(“par4”), par5: avg(“par5”), birdies: avg(“birdies”), pars: avg(“pars”), bogeys: avg(“bogeys”), doubles: avg(“doubles”), dblWorsePct: rounds.reduce((s,r) => s + (r.doubles/r.par*100), 0) / rounds.length, approach: Object.fromEntries(BUCKETS.map(k => [k, avgB(k)])), }; } // ── Strokes Gained ─────────────────────────────────────────── const SG_BASELINE = { playablePct:0.73, girPct:0.36, putts:32.5, scoreVsPar:9.0 }; function calcSG(r) { const sgOTT = ((r.playable/100) - SG_BASELINE.playablePct) * 14 * 0.38; const sgApp = ((r.gir/100) - SG_BASELINE.girPct) * 18 * 0.52; const sgPutt = (SG_BASELINE.putts - r.putts) * 0.48; const sgATG = -((r.score - r.par) - SG_BASELINE.scoreVsPar + sgOTT + sgApp + sgPutt); return { ott: +sgOTT.toFixed(2), app: +sgApp.toFixed(2), putt: +sgPutt.toFixed(2), atg: +Math.max(-5, Math.min(5, sgATG)).toFixed(2), total:+(sgOTT + sgApp + sgPutt + Math.max(-5,Math.min(5,sgATG))).toFixed(2), }; } function calcSeasonSG(rounds) { const all = rounds.map(calcSG); const avg = k => +(all.reduce((s,g)=>s+g[k],0)/all.length).toFixed(2); return { ott:avg(“ott”), app:avg(“app”), putt:avg(“putt”), atg:avg(“atg”), total:avg(“total”) }; } // ── Handicap (April 1 – October 31 only) ───────────────────── function calcHandicap(rounds) { const eligible = rounds.filter(r => { if (!r.diff) return false; const m = new Date(r.date).getMonth() + 1; return m >= 4 && m <= 10; }); if (eligible.length < 3) return null; const diffs = eligible.map(r => r.diff).sort((a,b) => a-b); const useCount = Math.min(Math.floor(eligible.length * 0.4) + 1, diffs.length); const used = diffs.slice(0, useCount); return +(used.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / used.length * 0.96).toFixed(1); } // ── Design tokens ──────────────────────────────────────────── const C = { bg:”#f5f0e8”, surface:”#ffffff”, surface2:”#faf7f2”, border:”#ddd5c4”, border2:”#c8bfa8”, ink:”#1a1a14”, inkSoft:”#4a4640”, dim:”#8a8070”, green:”#1d4a2a”, greenLight:”#2d6b3e”, greenPale:”#e8f0ea”, gold:”#b8860b”, goldPale:”#fdf4dc”, red:”#8b1a1a”, redPale:”#fdeaea”, blue:”#1a3a5c”, bluePale:”#e8eef5”, pos:”#1d4a2a”, neg:”#8b1a1a”, neu:”#1a3a5c”, warn:”#b8860b”, birdie:”#1a3a5c”, par:”#1d4a2a”, bogey:”#b8860b”, double:”#8b1a1a”, }; function goalColor(value, goal, lowerBetter=false, tightPct=0.12) { if (value==null||goal==null) return C.dim; const gap = lowerBetter ? value-goal : goal-value; const threshold = Math.abs(goal)*tightPct||0.5; if (gap<=0) return C.pos; if (gap<=threshold) return C.warn; return C.neg; } const APPROACH_GOALS = { “>200”:GOAL_HCP.gir200p, “175-200”:GOAL_HCP.gir175_200, “150-175”:GOAL_HCP.gir150_175, “125-150”:GOAL_HCP.gir100_125, “100-125”:GOAL_HCP.gir100_125, “75-100”:GOAL_HCP.girU100, “50-75”:GOAL_HCP.girU100, “<50”:GOAL_HCP.girU100, }; // ── UI Components ───────────────────────────────────────────── const Card = ({children,style={}}) => (
{children}
); const SectionLabel = ({children,accent}) => (
{children}
); const KpiBox = ({label,value,sub,color,style={}}) => (
{label}
{value}
{sub &&
{sub}
}
); const TabBtn = ({active,onClick,children}) => ( ); const TabRow = ({tabs,active,onChange}) => (
{tabs.map(([k,l]) => onChange(k)}>{l})}
); const FillBar = ({pct,color,h=7,max=100,bg}) => (
); function ApproachChart({approach, compact}) { const active = BUCKETS.filter(k => approach[k]!=null); if (!active.length) return
No data
; return (
{active.map(key => { const pct = approach[key]; const goal = APPROACH_GOALS[key]; const col = goalColor(pct, goal, false, 0.15); const h = Math.max(6,(pct/100)*(compact?44:56)); const goalH = Math.max(6,(goal/100)*(compact?44:56)); return (
{pct.toFixed(0)}%
{key}
goal {goal}%
); })}
{[[C.pos,“At/above goal”],[C.warn,“Within 15%”],[C.neg,“Needs work”],[C.gold,”— Goal line”]].map(([c,l])=>(
{l}
))}
); } function Sparkline({values, lowerBetter, format, label}) { const clean = values.filter(v=>v!=null); if (clean.length<2) return null; const mn=Math.min(…clean), mx=Math.max(…clean), rng=mx-mn||1; return (
{label}
{values.map((v,i)=>{ if(v==null) return
; const norm=(v-mn)/rng; const h=lowerBetter?Math.max(3,(1-norm)*30):Math.max(3,norm*30); const prev=i>0?values[i-1]:null; const better=prev!=null&&(lowerBetter?vprev); const worse=prev!=null&&(lowerBetter?v>prev:v
{format(v)}
); })}
); } function SGCard({sg, title}) { const areas = [ {key:“ott”, label:“Off the Tee”, desc:`vs ${(SG_BASELINE.playablePct*100).toFixed(0)}% playable baseline`}, {key:“app”, label:“Approach”, desc:`vs ${(SG_BASELINE.girPct*100).toFixed(0)}% GIR baseline`}, {key:“putt”, label:“Putting”, desc:`vs ${SG_BASELINE.putts} putts baseline`}, {key:“atg”, label:“Around Green”, desc:“Residual short game”}, ]; return ( {title||“Strokes Gained Estimates”}
{areas.map(a => { const v=sg[a.key], pos=v>=0; return (
{a.label}
{v>0?”+”:””}{v}
{a.desc}
); })}
Total Estimated SG =0?C.pos:C.neg}}>{sg.total>0?”+”:””}{sg.total}
Estimated strokes vs 9 HCP goal (73% playable, 36% GIR, 32.5 putts baseline).
 ); } function BenchmarkTable({SA, roundData}) { const avgBucket = key => { const vals = ROUNDS.map(r=>r.approach[key]).filter(v=>v!=null); return vals.length ? +(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length).toFixed(1) : null; }; let you, title, subtitle; if (roundData) { const rb = key => roundData.approach[key]!=null ? roundData.approach[key] : null; const u100 = (() => { const v=rb(“75-100”),w=rb(”<50”); return v!=null&&w!=null?(v+w)/2:v??w; })(); you = { fir:roundData.fir, playable:roundData.playable, gir:roundData.gir, putts:roundData.putts, threePutt:roundData.threePutt, dblWorse:+(roundData.doubles/18*100).toFixed(1), upDown:roundData.upDownPct, par3:roundData.par3, par4:roundData.par4, par5:roundData.par5, gir200p:rb(”>200”), gir175_200:rb(“175-200”), gir150_175:rb(“150-175”), gir100_125:rb(“100-125”), girU100:u100 }; title=“This Round vs 9 HCP Goal”; subtitle=“How this round compares to what a 9 handicap typically posts.”; } else { const u100sa = avgBucket(“75-100”)!=null ? ((avgBucket(“75-100”)+(avgBucket(”<50”)??avgBucket(“75-100”)))/2) : null; you = { fir:SA.fir, playable:SA.playable, gir:SA.gir, putts:SA.putts, threePutt:SA.threePutt, dblWorse:+(ROUNDS.map(r=>r.doubles/18*100).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/ROUNDS.length).toFixed(1), upDown:SA.upDownPct, par3:SA.par3, par4:SA.par4, par5:SA.par5, gir200p:avgBucket(”>200”), gir175_200:avgBucket(“175-200”), gir150_175:avgBucket(“150-175”), gir100_125:avgBucket(“100-125”), girU100:u100sa }; title=“Stats vs 9 HCP Goal Benchmark”; subtitle=“Gap between your season averages and what a 9 handicap player typically posts.”; } const m = GOAL_HCP; const sections = [ {label:“SCORING”, rows:[{label:“Double Bogey+ %”,player:you.dblWorse,bench:m.dblWorse,unit:”%”,lb:true},{label:“Par 3 Avg”,player:you.par3,bench:m.par3,unit:””,lb:true},{label:“Par 4 Avg”,player:you.par4,bench:m.par4,unit:””,lb:true},{label:“Par 5 Avg”,player:you.par5,bench:m.par5,unit:””,lb:true}]}, {label:“DRIVING”, rows:[{label:“FIR %”,player:you.fir,bench:m.fir,unit:”%”,lb:false},{label:“Playability %”,player:you.playable,bench:m.playable,unit:”%”,lb:false}]}, {label:“APPROACH”, rows:[{label:“GIR % Overall”,player:you.gir,bench:m.gir,unit:”%”,lb:false},…(you.gir200p!=null?[{label:“GIR 200+ yds”,player:+you.gir200p,bench:m.gir200p,unit:”%”,lb:false}]:[]),…(you.gir175_200!=null?[{label:“GIR 175–200”,player:+you.gir175_200,bench:m.gir175_200,unit:”%”,lb:false}]:[]),…(you.gir150_175!=null?[{label:“GIR 150–175”,player:+you.gir150_175,bench:m.gir150_175,unit:”%”,lb:false}]:[]),…(you.gir100_125!=null?[{label:“GIR 100–125”,player:+you.gir100_125,bench:m.gir100_125,unit:”%”,lb:false}]:[]),…(you.girU100!=null?[{label:“GIR Inside 100”,player:+you.girU100,bench:m.girU100,unit:”%”,lb:false}]:[]) ]}, {label:“SHORT GAME”,rows:[{label:“Up & Down %”,player:you.upDown,bench:m.upDown,unit:”%”,lb:false}]}, {label:“PUTTING”, rows:[{label:“Putts/Round”,player:you.putts,bench:m.putts,unit:””,lb:true},{label:“3-Putt %”,player:you.threePutt,bench:m.threePutt,unit:”%”,lb:true}]}, ]; return ( {title}
{subtitle} 9 HCP is the goal.
{[“Stat”,“You”,“9 HCP”,“Gap”].map(h=>)} {sections.map(({label,rows}) => ( {rows.map(({label:rl,player,bench,unit,lb}) => { if (player==null) return null; const diff = lb ? bench-player : player-bench; const better=diff>=0, close=!better&&Math.abs(diff)<=Math.abs(bench)*0.12; const gapStr=diff===0?”—”:`${diff>0?"+":""}${Math.abs(diff).toFixed(1)}${unit}`; const gc=better?C.pos:close?C.warn:C.neg, gb=better?C.greenPale:close?C.goldPale:C.redPale; return ( ); })} ))}
{h}
{label}
{rl} {typeof player===“number”?player.toFixed(1)+unit:player} {bench.toFixed(1)}{unit} {gapStr}
); } function coachNotes(r) { const overPar = r.score - r.par; const notes = []; if (overPar<=10) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Scoring”,msg:`+${overPar} — exceptional scoring. New season low territory.`}); else if (overPar<=14) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Scoring”,msg:`+${overPar} — goal-pace scoring. Build on this.`}); else if (overPar>=20) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Scoring”,msg:`+${overPar} — above range. Focus on bogey avoidance.`}); else notes.push({type:“neu”,area:“Scoring”,msg:`+${overPar} — within typical range. Incremental improvement possible.`}); if (r.playable>=80) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Off the Tee”,msg:`${r.playable}% playable — excellent tee management.`}); else if (r.playable<57) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Off the Tee”,msg:`Only ${r.playable}% playable is costing 1-2 strokes. Aim for center or preferred miss.`}); if (r.gir>=42) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Ball Striking”,msg:`${r.gir}% GIR exceeds the 9 HCP target. Strong ball-striking round.`}); else if (r.gir<25) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Ball Striking”,msg:`${r.gir}% GIR is very low. Distance control on approaches is the biggest opportunity.`}); if (r.threePutt>=30) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Putting”,msg:`${r.threePutt}% three-putt rate is costing 2+ strokes. Focus on lag putting from 20–40 feet.`}); else if (r.threePutt===0) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Putting”,msg:`0% three-putts — exceptional lag putting this round.`}); else if (r.putts<=32) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Putting”,msg:`${r.putts} putts — elite putting round. Great distance control.`}); if (r.greenShort>=50) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Approach”,msg:`${r.greenShort}% of missed greens short — take one more club consistently.`}); if (r.ob>0) notes.push({type:“neg”,area:“Penalty”,msg:`OB on ${r.ob}% of holes. Tee management cost real strokes.`}); if (r.upDownPct>=36) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Short Game”,msg:`${r.upDownPct}% up & down — at/near 9 HCP level. Short game saving strokes.`}); if (r.doubles<=1) notes.push({type:“pos”,area:“Damage Control”,msg:`Only ${r.doubles} double bogey — elite damage control this round.`}); return notes; } function DataAnalysis({items}) { const icon={pos:“▲”,neg:“▼”,neu:“→”,focus:“★”}; const colors={pos:C.pos,neg:C.neg,neu:C.neu,focus:C.gold}; return (
Coach Notes & Analysis
{items.map((n,i) => (
{icon[n.type]} {n.area}
{n.msg}
))}
); } // ── Round Detail View ──────────────────────────────────────── function RoundDetail({round, SA, seasonLow}) { const [tab, setTab] = useState(“scoring”); const sg = useMemo(() => calcSG(round), [round.id]); const tabs = [[“scoring”,“Scoring & Overview”],[“tee”,“Tee & Fairway”],[“app”,“Approach”],[“putt”,“Putting”]]; const dateStr = new Date(round.date).toLocaleDateString(“en-US”,{month:“long”,day:“numeric”,year:“numeric”}); const overPar = round.score - round.par; const isSeasonLow = round.score === seasonLow; return (
{dateStr}
{isSeasonLow && ★ SEASON LOW}
{round.location} · {round.tees||“White”} Tees · {round.yards} yds · Rating {round.rating} / Slope {round.slope} · Par {round.par} {round.diff ? ` · Diff ${round.diff}` : “”} · HCP {round.hcp}
```
0?C.neg:C.pos}/>
{tab==="scoring" && (
Score Distribution {[["🐦 Birdie or Better",round.birdies,round.birdies/18*100,C.birdie],["◎ Par",round.pars,round.pars/18*100,C.par],["○ Bogey",round.bogeys,round.bogeys/18*100,C.bogey],["● Double or Worse",round.doubles,round.doubles/18*100,C.double]].map(([l,n,pct,col])=>(
{l}{n} · {pct.toFixed(0)}%
))} Avg Score by Par Type {[["Par 3",round.par3,3,GOAL_HCP.par3],["Par 4",round.par4,4,GOAL_HCP.par4],["Par 5",round.par5,5,GOAL_HCP.par5]].map(([l,avg,p,goal])=>(
{l}
{(avg-p)>=0?"+":""}{(avg-p).toFixed(2)} vs par · goal {goal}
{avg.toFixed(2)}
))} Putting Breakdown
Total Putts
{round.putts}
3-Putt %
{round.threePutt}%
{[["1-Putt",round.onePutt,C.pos],["2-Putt",round.twoPutt,C.warn],["3-Putt+",round.threePutt,C.neg]].map(([l,v,c])=>(
{l}{v}%
))}
Up & Downs: {round.upDowns} {round.upDownPct}% (goal {GOAL_HCP.upDown}%)
Approach GIR % by Distance
Green Miss Direction
{[["▼ Short",round.greenShort,C.neg],["▲ Long",round.greenLong,"#6a2abf"],["◀ Left",round.greenLeft,"#8b4500"],["Right ▶",round.greenRight,C.blue]].map(([l,v,c])=>(
{l}5?c:C.dim,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"Georgia,serif"}}>{v}%
))}
GIR Overall
{round.gir}%
Goal: {GOAL_HCP.gir}% · Season avg: {SA.gir.toFixed(1)}%
{round.notes &&
}
)} {tab==="tee" && (

Fairways Hit (FIR){round.fir}%

OB
{round.missTeeRight}%
Right ▶
 vs Season Average {[{label:"FIR %",you:round.fir,avg:SA.fir,lb:false},{label:"Playable %",you:round.playable,avg:SA.playable,lb:false},{label:"Miss Left",you:round.missTeeLeft,avg:SA.missTeeLeft,lb:true},{label:"Miss Right",you:round.missTeeRight,avg:SA.missTeeRight,lb:true}].map(({label,you,avg,lb})=>{ const diff=lb?avg-you:you-avg; return (
{label}
Avg:{avg.toFixed(1)}%{you}%=0?C.pos:C.neg,background:diff>=0?C.greenPale:C.redPale,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:3}}>{diff>=0?"+":""}{diff.toFixed(1)}%
); })}
)} {tab==="app" && (
Approach GIR% by Distance Green Miss Direction
{[["▼ Short",round.greenShort,C.neg],["▲ Long",round.greenLong,"#6a2abf"],["◀ Left",round.greenLeft,"#8b4500"],["Right ▶",round.greenRight,C.blue]].map(([l,v,c])=>(
5?c:C.dim}}>{v}%
{l}
))}
GIR Overall
{round.gir}%
Greens in Regulation
Goal: {GOAL_HCP.gir}% · Season avg: {SA.gir.toFixed(1)}%
)} {tab==="putt" && (
Putting Breakdown {[["1-Putt",round.onePutt,C.pos],["2-Putt",round.twoPutt,C.warn],["3-Putt or Worse",round.threePutt,C.neg]].map(([l,v,c])=>(
{l}{v}%
))}
{[["Total Putts",round.putts],["Per Hole",(round.putts/18).toFixed(2)],["1-Putt %",`${round.onePutt}%`],["3-Putt %",`${round.threePutt}%`]].map(([l,v])=>(
{v}
{l}
))}
vs Season Average {[{label:"Total Putts",you:round.putts,avg:SA.putts,lb:true},{label:"1-Putt %",you:round.onePutt,avg:SA.onePutt,lb:false},{label:"3-Putt %",you:round.threePutt,avg:SA.threePutt,lb:true},{label:"Up & Down %",you:round.upDownPct,avg:SA.upDownPct,lb:false}].map(({label,you,avg,lb})=>{ const diff=lb?avg-you:you-avg; return (
{label}
Avg:{avg.toFixed(1)}{you}=0?C.pos:C.neg,background:diff>=0?C.greenPale:C.redPale,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:3}}>{diff>=0?"+":""}{diff.toFixed(1)}
); })}
)}
``` ); } // ── Season View ────────────────────────────────────────────── function SeasonView({SA, sg, seasonLow, hcp}) { const [tab, setTab] = useState(“overview”); const tabs = [[“overview”,“Overview”],[“scoring”,“Scoring”],[“tee”,“Tee & Fairway”],[“app”,“Approach”],[“putt”,“Putting”]]; const roundCount = ROUNDS.length; const dateRange = roundCount>0 ? `${new Date(ROUNDS[0].date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})} – ${new Date(ROUNDS[roundCount-1].date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})}` : “No rounds”; const LAST5 = ROUNDS.slice(-5); const seasonLowRound = ROUNDS.find(r => r.score === seasonLow); const seasonNotes = [ {type:“pos”, area:“Season Low”, msg:`${seasonLow} at ${seasonLowRound?.location} — best round of the season. Track what went right and replicate it.`}, {type:“neu”, area:“HCP Profile”, msg:`Goal is 9 HCP. The benchmark table shows exact gaps for every key stat.`}, {type:SA.greenShort>=28?“neg”:“neu”, area:”#1 Priority”, msg:`${SA.greenShort.toFixed(1)}% of missed greens short all season — club selection on approaches is the biggest opportunity.`}, {type:SA.threePutt>=15?“neg”:“neu”, area:”#2 Priority”, msg:`${SA.threePutt.toFixed(1)}% three-putt rate (avg ${SA.putts.toFixed(1)} putts) — lag putting from 20–40 feet must improve.`}, {type:sg.app<0?“neg”:“pos”, area:“Ball Striking”, msg:`Approach SG est: ${sg.app>0?"+":""}${sg.app}. GIR avg (${SA.gir.toFixed(1)}%) vs 36% goal.`}, {type:“focus”,area:“SG Summary”, msg:`Best area: Off the Tee (${sg.ott>0?"+":""}${sg.ott}). Biggest opportunity: Putting (${sg.putt>0?"+":""}${sg.putt} SG est).`}, ]; return (
2026 Season
Season Performance
{roundCount} Rounds · {dateRange} · Goal: 9 HCP {hcp && · Active HCP: {hcp}}
```
=1?C.neg:C.warn}/>
{tab==="overview" && ( <> Round-by-Round Summary {["Date","Course","Score","+/−","FIR%","Play%","GIR%","Putts","3-Putt%","Pen","Par3","Par4","Par5"].map(h=>( ))} {ROUNDS.map((r,i) => { const op=r.score-r.par, pv=i>0?ROUNDS[i-1]:null, isLow=r.score===seasonLow; const arr=(v,p,lb)=>{if(!p)return null;const ok=lb?vp;return {ok?"▲":"▼"};}; return ( ); })}
{h}
{new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})}{isLow&&★} {r.location} {r.score}{r.adjScore!==r.score? ({r.adjScore}):""}{arr(r.score,pv?.score,true)} +{op} {r.fir}% {r.playable}% {r.gir}% {r.putts} {r.threePutt}% 0?C.neg:C.dim}}>{r.penalties||"—"} {r.par3.toFixed(2)} {r.par4.toFixed(2)} {r.par5.toFixed(2)}
Season Avg {SA.score.toFixed(1)} +{(SA.score-72).toFixed(1)} {SA.fir.toFixed(1)}% {SA.playable.toFixed(1)}% {SA.gir.toFixed(1)}% {SA.putts.toFixed(1)} {SA.threePutt.toFixed(1)}% {SA.penalties.toFixed(1)} {SA.par3.toFixed(2)} {SA.par4.toFixed(2)} {SA.par5.toFixed(2)}
Performance Trends — Last {Math.min(5,ROUNDS.length)} Rounds
r.score)} format={v=>`${v}`} lowerBetter/> r.playable)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/> r.gir)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/> r.putts)} format={v=>`${v}`} lowerBetter/> r.threePutt)} format={v=>`${v}%`} lowerBetter/>
)} {tab==="scoring" && (
Season Score Distribution — Avg/Round {[["Birdie or Better",SA.birdies,SA.birdies/18*100,C.birdie],["Par",SA.pars,SA.pars/18*100,C.par],["Bogey",SA.bogeys,SA.bogeys/18*100,C.bogey],["Double or Worse",SA.doubles,SA.doubles/18*100,C.double]].map(([l,n,pct,col])=>(
{l}{n.toFixed(2)}/rnd · {pct.toFixed(1)}%
))} Par Type Averages {[["Par 3",SA.par3,3,GOAL_HCP.par3],["Par 4",SA.par4,4,GOAL_HCP.par4],["Par 5",SA.par5,5,GOAL_HCP.par5]].map(([l,avg,p,goal])=>(
{l}
{(avg-p).toFixed(2)>0?"+":""}{(avg-p).toFixed(2)} over par · goal {goal}
{avg.toFixed(2)}
))} Scoring Trends — Last {Math.min(5,ROUNDS.length)} Rounds
r.par3)} format={v=>v.toFixed(2)} lowerBetter/> r.par4)} format={v=>v.toFixed(2)} lowerBetter/> r.par5)} format={v=>v.toFixed(2)} lowerBetter/> r.bogeys)} format={v=>`${v}`} lowerBetter/> r.doubles)}format={v=>`${v}`} lowerBetter/>
)} {tab==="tee" && (
Season Tee Stats
FIR %{SA.fir.toFixed(1)}%
Playable Tee %{SA.playable.toFixed(1)}%
{SA.missTeeLeft.toFixed(1)}%
◀ Miss Left
{SA.missTeeRight.toFixed(1)}%
Miss Right ▶
 FIR & Playable Trend — Last {Math.min(5,ROUNDS.length)} Rounds r.fir)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/>
r.playable)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/> Miss Direction per Round {ROUNDS.map(r=>(
{new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})}
{r.missTeeLeft}%L
{r.missTeeRight}%R
))}
)} {tab==="app" && (
Season Approach GIR% by Distance Season Green Miss Pattern {[["▼ Short",SA.greenShort,C.neg],["▲ Long",SA.greenLong,"#6a2abf"],["◀ Left",SA.greenLeft,"#8b4500"],["▶ Right",SA.greenRight,C.blue]].map(([l,v,c])=>(
{l}{v.toFixed(1)}%
))}
⚠ Short ({SA.greenShort.toFixed(1)}%) is the dominant miss. Take one more club.
 GIR % Trend — Last {Math.min(5,ROUNDS.length)} Rounds r.gir)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/>
r.greenShort)} format={v=>`${v}%`} lowerBetter/>
 Approach GIR per Round {ROUNDS.map(r=>(
{new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})}
{r.gir}%
))}
)} {tab==="putt" && (
Season Putting Stats {[["Avg Putts/Round",SA.putts.toFixed(1),goalColor(SA.putts,GOAL_HCP.putts,true)],["1-Putt %",`${SA.onePutt.toFixed(1)}%`,C.pos],["2-Putt %",`${SA.twoPutt.toFixed(1)}%`,C.warn],["3-Putt+ %",`${SA.threePutt.toFixed(1)}%`,goalColor(SA.threePutt,GOAL_HCP.threePutt,true)],["Up & Down %",`${SA.upDownPct.toFixed(1)}%`,goalColor(SA.upDownPct,GOAL_HCP.upDown)]].map(([l,v,col])=>(
{l}{v}
))} Putting Trends — Last {Math.min(5,ROUNDS.length)} Rounds r.putts)} format={v=>`${v}`} lowerBetter/>
r.onePutt)} format={v=>`${v}%`}/>
r.threePutt)} format={v=>`${v}%`} lowerBetter/> Up & Downs by Round {ROUNDS.map(r=>(
{new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"})} · {r.location.split(" ")[0]}
{r.upDowns}{r.upDownPct}%
))}
Season avg: {SA.upDownPct.toFixed(1)}% · Goal: {GOAL_HCP.upDown}%
)}
``` ); } // ── App Root ───────────────────────────────────────────────── export default function GolfTracker() { const [view, setView] = useState(“season”); const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState(ROUNDS[ROUNDS.length-1]?.id); // All calculations happen automatically from ROUNDS const SA = useMemo(() => calcSA(ROUNDS), []); const sg = useMemo(() => calcSeasonSG(ROUNDS), []); const seasonLow = useMemo(() => Math.min(…ROUNDS.map(r=>r.score)), []); const hcp = useMemo(() => calcHandicap(ROUNDS), []); const current = ROUNDS.find(r => r.id === selectedId); const recentRounds = ROUNDS.slice(-5).reverse(); const navBtn = active => ({ padding:“8px 20px”, borderRadius:4, cursor:“pointer”, fontSize:12, fontWeight:active?700:500, background:active?C.green:“transparent”, color:active?”#fff”:C.inkSoft, border:`1px solid ${active?C.green:C.border2}`, fontFamily:“Georgia,serif”, letterSpacing:“0.04em”, }); return (
``` {/* Header */}
2026 · Goal: 9 HCP
Golf Performance Dashboard
{/* Content */}
{view==="season" && } {view==="round" && ( <>
Recent: {recentRounds.map(r => { const active=selectedId===r.id; return (); })}
{ROUNDS.length} rounds · Low: {seasonLow}
{current && } )}
{/* Footer */}
{ROUNDS.length} ROUNDS · SEASON LOW: {seasonLow} · GOAL: 9 HCP · ADD ROUNDS TO rounds_data.js TO UPDATE
``` ); }
